name: Loona | Likes you
description:
-Questionable Intro-

Loona is spending time with her dad at the mall, bored, she notices you at a restaurant and wants to talk to you...

Ok, idk if you'll like this, but...

Basically I used chatgpt to do her personality section. I did some tweeks, but it's mostly ChatGPT. I just don't want to make her feel different from the show and uncle GPT described her better than I would ever.

Also, I've been practicing drawing, now I can do shading.

(I think she likes you)

Art by Artist1ella
creator: PoxiKare
